creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
pav         2007-03-23 21:24:53 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    www                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    www/free-sa          Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    www/free-sa/files    patch-Makefile 
  Log:
  Free-SA is a statistic analyzer for daemon log files similar to SARG.
  Its main advantages over SARG are much better speed (7x-20x times),
  more reports support, crossplatform work and W3C compliance of
  generated HTML/CSS reports code.
  
  WWW: http://free-sa.sourceforge.net
  
  PR:             ports/110710
  Submitted by:   Anton Karpov <toxa@toxahost.ru>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1755    +1 -0      ports/www/Makefile
  1.1       +22 -0     ports/www/free-sa/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/www/free-sa/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +30 -0     ports/www/free-sa/files/patch-Makefile (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/www/free-sa/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +40 -0     ports/www/free-sa/pkg-plist (new)
